name: Single in Saxony - higher employee care rates
description: Single person earning €75,000 in Saxony — 0.5% higher employee care insurance due to extra public holiday (Buß- und Bettag)

sources.description: Income tax (€14,046) computed via §32a EStG 2025 Zone 3 formula for zvE=59,052. Saxony care rate 2.9% childless (vs 2.4% standard states).
sources.notes: Saxony (SN) care rate 2.9% childless — employee bears extra 0.5% due to abolition of Buß- und Bettag. Care = 66,150 × 2.9% = €1,918.35. zvE = 75,000 - 15,947.48 = 59,052.
